---
title: "Contact"
---

Ayon Ganguly   
Email: aganguly@iitg.ac.in, ayonganguly@gmail.com   
Phone: +91 361 258 2639

<br>
<hr>
<br>

### Mailing Address
Department of Mathematics   
Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati   
Guwahati-781 039   
Assam, India

<br>
<hr>
<br>

### Office Address
E1-210, Department of Mathematics   
Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati   
Guwahati-781 039   
Assam, India
